product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

Call our team today on 01354 700853 for more information or download the Alumasc Heritage Guttering Datasheet and Installation Guide below.  Delivery | Milled Finish - 3-5 working days | Powder Coated Colours IncludingTextured Black - 10-15 working days |

product.name: 65mm Square Downpipe Bend 112.5 Degrees. BR509
product.description: The 65mm Square Downpipe Bend 112.5 degrees can also be known as a Top and Bottom Offset Bend and traditionally known as a Swan Neck Bend when paired with another bend. The bend features a pocket around the base for the downpipe to sit in. This hides the rough edges from the cut of the downpipe. Order in Black, Brown, White or Anthracite.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Snow Guard
product.description: With the UK weather conditions becoming increasingly unpredictable, installing Floplast's Snow / Tile Guard ensures your property is protected, as well as preventing unnecessary injury from falling tiles, snow and debris.    Easy to handle and straightforward to install.   Prevents snow/tile slippage.   2m wide x 162mm high.   Brackets should be fitted at a maximum of 800mm centres, using two No.2 12 x 1" round head screws.  Galvanised - for long lasting performance.   Protects conservatories from falling roof tiles.   Assists in reducing insurance costs/claims caused by snow/tile damage.

As you will be aware, the ongoing situation in the Middle East is having a significant impact on global fuel costs. Lindab has informed us that they are no longer able to absorb these increases and have therefore introduced additional surcharges. Unfortunately, we are also unable to absorb these rising costs, although we anticipate that this will be a temporary issue. A25 surchargewill be applied to all orders over 500.  Please note: All orders between 0-1000 + vat containing 3mtr lengths of gutter or downpipe, will incur a 75.00 +VAT (90.00 inc vat) delivery charge.  All orders between 0-1000 + vat that contain fittings only will incur 55.00 +VAT. (66.00 inc vat)  For delivery to Northern Ireland, Scottish Highlands and other Offshore UK Addresses, please contact our sales team on 01354 700853 or by email at Sales@DrainageOnline.co.uk.  Drainage Online will be in contact after the order is processed to take the additional delivery charge.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: 110mm Double Soil Branch 92.5dg
product.description: Manufactured by Brett Martin, the 110mm Soil Pipe Double Branch 92.5 Degree serves as a four-way junction for 110mm soil pipe systems. The branch can be installed with ease whilst also providing a watertight connection, thanks to the push-fit mechanism available across the range, kitemarked for BS EN 1329-1.  Get in touch today on 01254 286083 for more product specifications, or download our Brett Martin Datasheet below.
